steps.title: Start with slope-intercept form
steps.content: A linear function with slope $2$ has the form $$g(x)=2x+b.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The function is $g(x)=2x+12$. This matches choice C.

steps.title: Use the point as a check
steps.content: Substituting $x=1$ into choice C gives $g(1)=2(1)+12=14$, exactly the given point. The other choices give $2$, $4$, or $16$ when $x=1$.
